description: Composition Grey capris made of 61% cotton, 33% polyester and 6% spandex, has a broad elasticated waistband and drawstring, elasticated hem and has embroidered branding below the waistband on the left and at the back on the right Fitting Regular Wash care Gentle machine wash inside out with like colours using cold water Do not bleach, or dry clean Line dry Do not iron Whatever the occasion, be it a visit to the mall or park, jogging or just hanging out with friends, this pair of capris from nike is a well deserved addition to your casual wardrobe. The sporty look does wonders for your casual style and the soft fabric keeps you extremely comfy. Pair it with a sporty T-shirt and running shoes. Model Statistics Product is a size M on a model of height 6' and waist 28"
